title: cortia depressa
intro: Cortia depressa, a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, is a small shrub native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cortia depressa include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Cortia depressa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional folk medicine.
